members.name: AddPreset
members.summary: Adds the given color to a list of color presets. The presets are displayed in the color picker and the user will be able to select them. [b]Note:[/b] The presets list is only for [i]this[/i] color picker.

members.name: AddRecentPreset
members.summary: Adds the given color to a list of color recent presets so that it can be picked later. Recent presets are the colors that were picked recently, a new preset is automatically created and added to recent presets when you pick a new color. [b]Note:[/b] The recent presets list is only for [i]this[/i] color picker.

members.name: ErasePreset
members.summary: Removes the given color from the list of color presets of this color picker.

members.name: EraseRecentPreset
members.summary: Removes the given color from the list of color recent presets of this color picker.

members.name: GetPresets
members.summary: Returns the list of colors in the presets of the color picker.

members.name: GetRecentPresets
members.summary: Returns the list of colors in the recent presets of the color picker.

members.name: CanAddSwatches
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], it's possible to add presets under Swatches. If [code]false[/code], the button to add presets is disabled.

members.name: ColorModesVisible
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the color mode buttons are visible.

members.name: DeferredMode
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the color will apply only after the user releases the mouse button, otherwise it will apply immediately even in mouse motion event (which can cause performance issues).

members.name: EditAlpha
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], shows an alpha channel slider (opacity).

members.name: EditIntensity
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], shows an intensity slider. The intensity is applied as follows: convert the color to linear encoding, multiply it by [code]2 ** intensity[/code], and then convert it back to nonlinear sRGB encoding.

members.name: HexVisible
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the hex color code input field is visible.

members.name: PickerShape
members.summary: The shape of the color space view.

members.name: PresetsVisible
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the Swatches and Recent Colors presets are visible.

members.name: SamplerVisible
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the color sampler and color preview are visible.

members.name: SlidersVisible
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the color sliders are visible.

signals.name: ColorChanged
signals.summary: Emitted when the color is changed.

signals.name: PresetAdded
signals.summary: Emitted when a preset is added.

signals.name: PresetRemoved
signals.summary: Emitted when a preset is removed.

values.name: MODE_HSV
values.summary: Allows editing the color with Hue/Saturation/Value sliders.

values.name: MODE_LINEAR
values.summary: Allows editing the color with Red/Green/Blue sliders in linear color space.

values.name: MODE_OKHSL
values.summary: Allows editing the color with Hue/Saturation/Lightness sliders. OKHSL is a new color space similar to HSL but that better match perception by leveraging the Oklab color space which is designed to be simple to use, while doing a good job at predicting perceived lightness, chroma and hue. [url=https://bottosson.github.io/posts/colorpicker/]Okhsv and Okhsl color spaces[/url]

values.name: MODE_RGB
values.summary: Allows editing the color with Red/Green/Blue sliders in sRGB color space.

values.name: SHAPE_HSV_RECTANGLE
values.summary: HSV Color Model rectangle color space.

values.name: SHAPE_HSV_WHEEL
values.summary: HSV Color Model rectangle color space with a wheel.

values.name: SHAPE_NONE
values.summary: The color space shape and the shape select button are hidden. Can't be selected from the shapes popup.

values.name: SHAPE_OKHSL_CIRCLE
values.summary: HSL OK Color Model circle color space.

values.name: SHAPE_OK_HL_RECTANGLE
values.summary: OKHSL Color Model rectangle with constant saturation.

values.name: SHAPE_OK_HS_RECTANGLE
values.summary: OKHSL Color Model rectangle with constant lightness.

values.name: SHAPE_VHS_CIRCLE
values.summary: HSV Color Model circle color space. Use Saturation as a radius.
